Glon..Back: Some months after being violently jarred by being thrown from a carriage, a sensitiveness of the upper part of the back and neck came on.
Glon..Chest: a feeling as if all the blood in the body must be rushing around the heart, with a sense of heat or a boiling sensation in the region of the heart, or in the left side of the chest.
Glon..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: With this congestion of the head there is commonly vomiting, palpitation of the heart, pain in the stomach, great difficulty in breathing and finally loss of consciousness.
Glon..Extremities: The pulsations are tremendous and when they are greatest in the head they are felt also in the extremities. The fingers and toes pulsate, there is pulsation throughout the back, and it seems that the whole body throbs.
Glon..Extremities, coldness: In the extremities we have great coldness. The extremities cold, pale and perspiring, the head hot and the face flushed and purple or bright red.
Glon..Extremities, coldness, hands: while walking on the street he feels a surging to the brain like a flush of heat and a flush on the face, his hands tremble, and the hands and feet become cold, he breaks out in a sweat
Glon..Generalities: There are some persons that are apparently plethoric; very much affected by the slightest exertion and who have pulsation all over; pulsation in a warm room.
Glon..Generalities, faintness, fainting: any little exertion or excitement brings on the rush of blood to the heart and fainting spells; fainting, spells in women, who are not supposed to be subject to fainting.
Glon..Head: The most common feature in this remedy is the surging of blood to the head and to the heart. A patient often describes the state as a feeling as if all the blood in the body must be rushing around the heart, with a sense of heat or a boiling sensation in the region of the heart, or in the left side of the chest.
Glon..Mind: All degrees of confusion of mind, even loss of consciousness, will be present.
Glon..Stomach: With this congestion of the head there is commonly vomiting, palpitation of the heart, pain in the stomach, great difficulty in breathing and finally loss of consciousness.
Glon..Generalities, faintness: any little exertion or excitement brings on the rush of blood to the heart and fainting spells; fainting, spells in women, who are not supposed to be subject to fainting. Great weakness, palpitation, trembling of the limbs, shaking of one or both hands as with palsy.
Glon..Head, congestion: Glonoine corresponds to congestive states in the head that come on suddenly, especially from heat, but also from gaslight, or from any bright light.
Glon..Clinical: Children get sick in the night after sitting up at an open fire or falling asleep there.
Glon..Heart & Circulation, heart: Laborious action of the heart is a strong feature of the remedy; pulsation all over.
Glon..Head, vertex: Vertex burning hot, likewise upper part of back.
Glon..Back, dorsal region, back: The burning heat seems to appear at the top of the head and extend down between the shoulders; a sensation of heat, as from a band.
Glon..Heart & Circulation: Fluttering in the region of the heart. Pulse quick, irregular, slow or quick and wiry.
Glon..Back, dorsal region: Hot, especially in the back of the neck and between the shoulders.
Glon..Face: Face bluish, with a heavy, stupid expression.
Glon..Head, heat: The whole crown of the head feels as if it were covered by a hot iron, as if an oven were close by.
Glon..Head, pain: every pulsation is painful, so that there are painful pulsations and sometimes painless pulsations.
Glon..Generalities, heat: It is noticeable also that Glonoine symptoms are worse in the heat of summer and relieved in winter. The dull headaches and the continuous headaches are aggravated from warm weather and ameliorated from cold.
Glon..Mind, dullness: he looks around him and does not know which way to go home, he does not know where his dwelling is. He looks in the faces of friends and they seem strange, he loses his way when be is near home. It is a confusion which soon passes away, and he feels better again.
Glon..Heart & Circulation, palpitation, tumult: Persons who are subject to palpitation with dyspnea, upon any effort, he cannot go uphill, he cannot walk along the pavement without bringing on palpitation and dyspnea; any little exertion or excitement brings on the rush of blood to the heart and fainting spells
Glon..Eye: Red eyes, with photophobia; optical illusions. Black specks before the eyes; blindness.
Glon..Eye, injected: The pupils are dilated and the eyes red.
Glon..Eye, redness: The pupils are dilated and the eyes red.
Glon..Clinical, convulsions: Convulsions come on, convulsions throughout all the limbs, the neck and whole body drawn back, opisthotonos.
